homepage.intro: I am Artur Marbach from Hamburg, specializing in frontend development with Angular and JavaScript, with a focus on modern and high-performance web applications.
Enthusiasm: I develop applications in a structured and analytical way, placing strong emphasis on clean code, clear architecture, and good user experience.
Commitment: In addition, I have knowledge in the field of DevSecOps and a solid understanding of secure and scalable applications.
Skill Development: I develop modern web applications with a focus on design, performance, and user experience.
Portfolio: A selection of my projects – explore the applications and get an impression of my work.
development1.description: Kanban-based task manager with drag-and-drop functionality, user assignment, and subtask support, including simple backend integration for data persistence.
development3.description: Slack-inspired real-time chat application with channel-based communication and Firebase integration. Focus on clean Angular architecture and scalable frontend design.
development2.description: JavaScript-based 2D jump-and-run game with an object-oriented architecture, custom game mechanics, collision detection, and animated character controls.
Communication: Feel free to contact me via the form – I look forward to hearing from you and learning more about your ideas.
